pages.description: Disturbed cotton is obtained by harvesting $(l:herbology/wispy_cotton)Wispy Cotton$(/l) in the $(l:dimensions/spirit_world)Spirit World$(/l) when one or more players are experiencing nightmares. This cotton can be spun into $(l:resources/tormented_twine)Tormented Twine$(/l) in the $(l:artifacts/devices/spinning_wheel)Spinning Wheel$(/l), and cannot be replanted.
pages._comment: Unlocked when the player enters the Spirit World
